channel.title: Dr. Israr Ahmed Podcast
channel.itunes:keywords: Dr Israr Ahmed,Dr Israr Ahmed Bayan,Dr Israr Ahmed lectures,Dr Israr Ahmed Clips,Dr Israr Ahmed Podcast,Tanzeem-e-Islami
channel.itunes:author: Dr. Israr Ahmed ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
channel.itunes:subtitle: Dr Israr Ahmed
channel.itunes:summary:
The Dr. Israr Ahmed Podcast features a curated collection of Islamic bayans, lectures, and discussions by Dr. Israr Ahmed, including both short clips and full-length talks from his extensive archive.

The aim of this podcast is to bring together Dr. Israr Ahmed’s long-form lectures as well as selected shorter segments in one place

Where to Listen

You can listen to the Dr. Israr Ahmed Podcast on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and other major podcast platforms.

For Inquiries or Copyright: contactsofion@gmail.com


Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.
channel.description:
The Dr. Israr Ahmed Podcast features a curated collection of Islamic bayans, lectures, and discussions by Dr. Israr Ahmed, including both short clips and full-length talks from his extensive archive.

The aim of this podcast is to bring together Dr. Israr Ahmed’s long-form lectures as well as selected shorter segments in one place

Where to Listen

You can listen to the Dr. Israr Ahmed Podcast on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and other major podcast platforms.

For Inquiries or Copyright: contactsofion@gmail.com


Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.
